description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large glass doors and windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house features a spacious balcony or patio area with a hot tub, potted plants, and a glass railing, suggesting a focus on outdoor relaxation. The interior layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open-plan design, with wood flooring in the main hallway and living areas. The windows are arranged in vertical strips and large panels, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is defined by double glass doors leading to the patio, with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing accessibility and simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious patio featuring a hot tub and plants. The design is minimalist, with white walls and wood flooring visible inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main patio with a hot tub, glass railing, and double glass doors leading inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting tall vertical windows and the open-plan living area with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional glass doors, a secondary entry, and more private rooms with less exterior detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fewer windows, showing the back of the house and a more enclosed, private section.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips and large panels, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors opening onto a patio with glass railing, no steps or porch, minimalist and accessible
